title: Lasianthus langkokensis

intro: Lasianthus langkokensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Lasianthus langkokensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
